reason: The best previous result used weighted_bce, specaugment, 5e-4, adamw, and cosine_decay. To improve upon this, I will keep the highly successful loss (weighted_bce) and augmentation (specaugment), and the stable learning rate (5e-4). I am changing the optimizer from adamw to standard adam, and the schedule from cosine_decay to constant, to test if these fundamental changes yield better generalization without losing the core successful components.
